title: Lawlessness in New York City
markdown:
Apparently the [cops in New York City are above the law](http://www.washingtonpost.com/wp-dyn/content/article/2008/08/02/AR2008080201503.html).  They can use the police system to allow them selves to break the law with impunity and intimidate and harrass anyone who tries to hold the police to account.


Shame on New York.
